name: vedaai-monorepo
description: VedaAI Monorepo containing Next.js frontend and Express/BullMQ backend

scripts.install:all: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
